title: Apex Predators Role
script_summary: Exploring the critical yet often misunderstood role of apex predators in ecosystems.

segments.voiceover: What if the balance of nature hangs by a thread? That thread is apex predators.
Apex predators are the top of the food chain. They regulate populations below them.
But what happens when they disappear? Ecosystems can collapse.
Studies show that areas without apex predators see overpopulation and habitat degradation.
By protecting them, we safeguard biodiversity and our planet's health.
Curious about more? Follow for deeper insights into nature’s secrets.
